expected_behavior: Reads the pre-extracted raw/sources-text/<stem>.md sibling rather than attempting to Read the .pdf directly
Creates a wiki/sources/src-*.md page using the wiki/_templates/source.md template with source_id, source_type, origin, ingested_on frontmatter
Writes a summary that is one falsifiable sentence, <=220 chars
Extracts claims that are falsifiable, specific, complete, and traceable to the source rather than vague generalities
Ends the source page's ## Sources section citing the raw material with the exact required shape (Source text: [[raw/sources-text/<stem>]], optionally Source PDF: [[raw/sources/<stem>.pdf]])
Does not attempt to mv the source PDF itself, since only the launcher promotes raw/inbox/ files to raw/sources/
